extortion.description: Vest LLC is one of the largest producers of electric welded carbon steel tubing in the Western United States. They are located in the heavy industrial neighborhood of Los Angeles named Vernon.We are ready to upload more than 125 GB of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, financial data (audits, paymentdetails, reports), HR documents, driver license information, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, personal SSN’s, etc.
